reasoning_content: Okay, the user just asked for the current date. This is a straightforward request with no hidden complexity. I need to provide an accurate date format that's clear and universally understood. Since I don't have real-time access, I'll rely on the system's timestamp which is set to the server's current time. The standard format of YYYY-MM-DD works best—it's unambiguous and ISO 8601 compliant. No need for extra explanations unless the user follows up. Just state the date directly.
